reviews.review_description: Think tower defense meets civilization. Simple enough gameplay but there are more than enough ways to play a level without being bored. There is a game speed in the settings if you find yourself losing in first five minutes :)
It’s a really good game

reviews.review_title: How is this a free game?!!?
reviews.review_description: This is a fantastic strategy game and not just for VR but overall! The controls alone are some of the best I've come across in vr for this type of game especially when moving around the map. Too many times I find a game think this is great.......until I try to play and the controls make it impossible or extremely difficult and bear in mind I normally PAY for this disappointment so imagine my surprise when I got this and the controls are perfect. Is it a perfect game? No but only through my personal views of it needing a bit of "spit and polish" but absolutely nothing to do with the devs and this absolute gem of a game because make no mistake as it is now it feels like a full finished game.
Add a mode like a sandbox and people can make there own maps

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! I have just released a Freestyle Level where players can choose their own starting conditions and which map to spawn on. I will be expanding this mode in the future with more content.

reviews.review_description: Truly good game. It needs 200 levels more😀

plenty to love in this unassuming RTS. Fun gameplay loop, lots of little detail, fast progression, tons of unlockables, powers, buildings, heroes... many good choices for VR gameplay, including scale slider and usual comfort options. a small hidden gem on Quest.

This game is amazing for just releasing not to mention it’s so simple it reminds me of WorldBox but in vr. I can’t wait to see where they take this game. I just hope they add a sandbox mode or something

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback! I have just released a Freestyle Level where players can choose their own starting conditions and which map to spawn on. I will be expanding this mode in the future with more content.

reviews.review_description:
I didn't see anywhere how to get about, but the Devs let me know to use the joysticks to move. So thank you for that 😊

The help info for each building is super useful.

I'm really enjoying this game and looking forward to see more locations and quests. I would like if every level could be played on easy, advanced and expert.

developer_response.body:
No worries, thank you for the feedback.
The left thumbstick allows moving across the map, and the right thumbstick allows snapturn or smoothturn, which is able to be set in the settings.

reviews.review_description: This is a genuinely amazing game and I hope to see more from this creator

I got Majesty: The Fantasy Kingdom Sim waaaay back in the fourth grade from a Scholastic book order. It's one of my favourite games of all time, so to play it in VR? AMAZING!

The devs really stayed true to the original, I'm really happy to see you can click on your heroes to follow them around, even your tax collectors. I absolutely loathe the money making quest and wish I could just *ENTERfillthisbagENTER* lol

It's a great game, give it a try. I'm excited to see where this goes!

Nice enough with intuitive controls.
Would like checkbox auto upgrade” or ”auto build” for troop buildings etc.

Personally I do t think this kind of games are gaining so much to be in VR.
I would consider this a cozy game. You go through lvls to complete quests and it's not stressful

reviews.review_title: Solid to play when you want to chill ☺️
reviews.review_description: Loved it

Multiplayer!!!!!. And character control. U should be able to embody each unit
:)
and when u do multiplayer,make emotes and upgrades, and mapmaker
I installed thinking it was going to be bad but oh i was rong this game is amazing
it's fun, but leaves you wanting more. more features, more customization more maps. but it's a good time killer.

developer_response.body: Thank you for trying it out, more content is being worked on and will release as periodic updates over time.

reviews.review_description: Very faithful to the game(s) that inspired it. The controls are simple. The building is easy. There's little to no guess work as tabs are pretty self explanatory. If you don't understand what it is clicking it at least clears it up. Hopefully more will get added to it but for what it is absolutely a 5* experience if you enjoy this type of game.

Strategy games are notoriously difficult to get right — especially in VR — and many recent titles with premium price tags have struggled to strike the right balance. Then comes Ardanian Kingdoms, a free game that nails it. The developer is highly active, regularly improving the experience (including adding new language support), and it truly shows.

Each level is gripping, challenging, and addictive. The gameplay mechanics are tight and intuitive, and the tutorial is exceptionally well crafted, making it easy for newcomers to pick up and play. The resource management and tactical decisions are satisfying, and it always feels rewarding to beat a level and refine your strategy.

And yes — the game is completely free. It’s hard to believe you can enjoy so many hours of well-designed gameplay, strategic thinking, and kingdom-conquering fun without spending a cent.

If you’re into strategy and looking for your next obsession, Ardanian Kingdoms is an absolute must-try. I would put 6 stars if I could. Dive in — you won’t regret it.

A nice surprise!
Once you get past the visual aspect, the graphics are quite simplistic but quite successful, in the style of the 16-bit consoles of my childhood, you're pleasantly surprised by the game's ergonomics, mechanics, and depth.
First of all, there's a comprehensive menu, with all the visual and sound comfort options and more.
A tutorial guides you through the first three missions.
You discover the game simply, step by step, and you get hooked!
The animations of the characters carrying out your orders are very nice, and you can't wait to explore the game more in depth soon.
I admit I was hesitant before launching it, but once you've tried it, this game makes you want to come back.
An important point to note: all the texts are translated into several languages, a plus for this game from an indie who shares his passion with us in a beautiful way.
A small game in appearance, but which ultimately offers a great adventure, well done!
My french video test: https://youtu.be/M4cMPOgq1ng

This demo was fun to play, engaging, and easy to learn. So much detail from your men moving about the map, upgrades and army building, and even some questing. 
Plenty of strategy to deploy with the flag placement and directing your guys around the map. Building little medieval cities and expanding into new areas. 
Totally recommend checking this out.

reviews.review_title: Just like majesty without the narration
reviews.review_description: I’ve been wanting to play majesty or a game like it for a long time, I really enjoyed that one from my childhood, you nailed it with this game!  Thank you for creating it and making it free!!!

I absolutely love it! This game is really well executed. Excellent amout of strategy and progression, it's like settlers meets warcraft. I love that you can flag up quests for your troops to take on. Graphics are nice and the controls are simple and accurate. This "Demo" is one of the most fun RTS games I've played on quest. Don't miss downloading it and giving it a try. Can't wait to see where this game goes. Hope there is more voice acted story and maybe being able to watch and bet on the tournaments would be fun. Great level of detail for a quest game too. Well done!

A very well made, detailed and deep strategy game that feels unique but familiar at the same time.
. Really impressive range of things to build as you explore each map.
Best of all it's early access, so let's hope there's plenty more to come

reviews.review_title: It has the opportunity to improve
reviews.review_description:
Add a multiplayer mode
The soldiers should attack, defend,and stay where i ordered them to stay, not in a continuous movement
It crashed at the end of stages !
Overall the game is pretty good

developer_response.body: Thanks for checking it out, I am currently working on fixing the crashes, sorry about that!

reviews.review_description: Ive just done my review of it on youtube and its a solid 8/10 great work.
Please make multiy player and codes to join
Feels like childhood, but better in VR!
